title: abeec Pastel Daily Planner Set – Stationery Supplies Including: 56 Sheet Weekly Planner, A5 Notebook, 10 x Assorted Sticky Notes Set and Planner Stickers
features: Girls Stationary Gift Sets - This Stationery Set For Girls Makes A Brilliant Gift For A Stationery Lover. Suitable As Gifts For 10 Year Olds, Presents For 9 Year Old Girls, Pass The Parcel Gifts, Easter Gifts For Girls

Daily Planner Pad - This Pastel Planner Set Contains Everything You Need To Keep Yourself Organised From Week To Week; With Accessories To Support Daily Planning, Note Taking And Important Reminders. An All Around Great Girls Daily Planner Notebook Set
Stationery Gifts For Women - This Weekly Planner Set Contains 1 X A5 Notebook, Sticky Notes, Stickers & A Daily Planner. The Perfect Daily Planner For Anyone With A Busy Schedule

Work Organiser Planner - This Planner Set Would Also Work Well As A Daily Work Planner To Place On Your Desk In An Office Environment - Daily Desk Planner. Why Not Pair With Pastel Stationery, Pastel Sticky Notes & Other Stationary For Girls

Sticky Notes Set – Containing 10 Different Sticky Note Pads Each With 40 Sheets Each, This Set Ensures Nothing Will Ever Slip Your Mind Again – To Make Your Notes More Exciting, Choose From The Selection Of Stickers Included
